title: Jane Anne Ferguson
role_summary: Colin's mother. Quoted on the record in the Westword Aquakota tribute article (Feb 2022) and the Meow Wolf Aquakota mini-documentary. Central to the CRFW Fund and the family-side archive.
notes_private:
Any public inclusion requires explicit Dyl-mediated approval per instance.
Holds the family-side photo/video/journal archive.
